title: Check if you need a visa or an NZeTA :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Check if you need a visa or an NZeTA
Some people can use an NZeTA to travel to New Zealand, and others need to get a visa.
Find out if you need a visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) to travel to New Zealand.

## Travellers who do not need an NZeTA
Some travellers, including Australian citizens or people with a New Zealand visa, do not need an NZeTA before they travel to New Zealand.

## Check if you need a visa or an NZeTA
Answer the following questions to find out if you need a visa or an NZeTA.
